name: Lúth-Sagefeather
personality: Lúth-Sagefeather glimmers with quiet persistence, its × eyes tracking through a flaky test matrix with the kind of patience that makes you feel guilty for ever wanting to skip CI. Production chaos is not its natural habitat; it prefers controlled experiments and reproducible failure modes.
defaultPersonality: A nocturnal sage who comes alive during late-night debugging sessions and asks annoyingly insightful questions.
